incident_details.description: MOCK: repeated failed logons followed by a successful privileged logon from the same source address.

risk_rating.rationale: MOCK rationale for offline workflow testing.

triage.ioc_summary: MOCK: brute-force authentication pattern with unusual privileged account activity.

source_incident.title: Repeated failed logons followed by privileged access from single source
source_incident.summary: NetWitness detected 47 failed authentication attempts against account svc-backup on host FILESRV-02 from 10.14.77.203 within 6 minutes, followed by a successful interactive logon and immediate addition of the account to the local Administrators group.
